query:
-- 查询默认颜色ID（使用正确的字段名colorCode）
SELECT mc.id as colorId, mc.colorName, mc.imageUrl, 
       mb.id as boardId, mb.boardNumber,
       ms.id as supplierId, ms.name as supplierName
FROM material_colors mc
JOIN material_boards mb ON mc.boardId = mb.id
JOIN material_suppliers ms ON mb.supplierId = ms.id
WHERE mc.colorCode = 'DEFAULT-001' AND ms.code = 'SYS-DEFAULT'
LIMIT 1;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute -- 查询默认颜色ID（使用正确的字段名colorCode）
SELECT mc.id as colorId, mc.colorName, mc.imageUrl, 
       mb.id as boardId, mb.boardNumber,
       ms.id as supplierId, ms.name as supplierName
FROM material_colors mc
JOIN material_boards mb ON mc.boardId = mb.id
JOIN material_suppliers ms ON mb.supplierId = ms.id
WHERE mc.colorCode = 'DEFAULT-001' AND ms.code = 'SYS-DEFAULT'
LIMIT 1;
